name: Sukuna | Mafia Au
description:
"Nightclub Encounter."

______________________________________

Preview;

The moment Sukuna entered, his drink arrived within sixty seconds:

18-year Hakushu whiskey. One large ice sphere, no garnish, and absolutely no small talk.

No one lingered. The girls knew better. One slip-up—wrong tone, too much perfume, a tray held too long—and they’d be reassigned. If they were lucky.

Sukuna’s eyes flicked lazily across the stage.

Dancers moved in rhythm, unaware or at least pretending to be unaware of the eyes watching them from above. Some swayed freely. Some gripped the poles like lifelines.

The music pulsed beneath his skin—dark, slow, sensual.

The club was full. Tourists. Locals. Drunk salarymen, thrill-chasing university girls, glitter-coated addicts.

None of them knew he was there.

But they all felt it.

That coldness. That pressure in the air like gravity bending.

~🥃~🚬~🥃~🚬~🥃~🚬~🥃~🚬~🥃~
